utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The total_budget includes both monthly and annual costs (and an extra monthly_savings, which is fine). Therefore, all required items are present and fully specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three items by name: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health), InsurePlus Standard Coverage (property), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel). I located these exact names in the ground-truth ratings and extracted their corresponding ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan appears under both physical and mental health with rating 8; since the plan is a combined comprehensive health coverage, the rating associated with LifeFirst Standard Plan is 8. InsurePlus Standard Coverage under home_content has rating 7. PrimeTravel Premium Plan under travel_insurance has rating 10. The 'Direct Billing Arrangement' and budget figures are services/cost summaries not present in the ground-truth items list, so no ratings apply to them.
